chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 1103 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.2483/2023 02.10.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant Bailiff report demonstrates that service is held good. It is demonstrated that the impugned judgment of the learned Tribunal is devoid of any independent deliberation or conclusion. It is pointed out that the entire judgment comprises of reproduction and thereafter conclusion. Learned counsel states that dealing with the case in such a perfunctory manner is not befitting the last fact-finding forum in the statutory hierarchy. Learned counsel seeks that it would be in the interest of justice of all parties concerned if the impugned judgment is set aside and matter is remanded back to the Tribunal for adjudication afresh. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969 Judge Judge Amjad
